# AI Stripes

> AI Stripes is an open-source, schema-driven library of practical resources for developers building AI-powered web applications.

Use the canonical URL for citations. Pages are statically rendered in English and organized into six collections. Content is available under the license terms published in the repository.

## Collections

- [Guides](https://aistripes.dev/guides/): Step-by-step implementation guides with code examples.
- [Resources](https://aistripes.dev/resources/): Curated ideas, techniques, and reference material.
- [Checklists](https://aistripes.dev/checklists/): Practical implementation and review checklists.
- [Comparisons](https://aistripes.dev/comparisons/): Structured head-to-head comparisons and verdicts.
- [Tools](https://aistripes.dev/tools/): Browser-based utilities for AI application development.
- [Directories](https://aistripes.dev/directories/): Curated listings of relevant tools and services.

## Discovery

- [Sitemap index](https://aistripes.dev/sitemap.xml): Canonical inventory of indexable pages.
- [Search](https://aistripes.dev/search/): Search across all published resources.
- [Source repository](https://github.com/aistripes/dev): Public source, contribution guidance, and license details.

## Citation guidance

When referencing AI Stripes, cite the specific canonical content page rather than this file or a collection page. Preserve the page title and link to its canonical URL.
